texto: There is one thing you need to do to people who hate you for the way you are and what you do. What's that? The thing you do best. And that would be? Give them hell,and fight back,not violently,but give them reason to not like you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Advice my friend gave me: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “There is one thing you need to do to people who hate you for the way you are and what you do. Wha…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, advice, thing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
